important_emails.subject: PS VIBE, are you open on Martyrs' Day?
important_emails.body_preview:
Jul

19

Let customers know your holiday hours for July

When your business has an irregular schedule, like holidays or special  
events, you can enter special hours in advance to let customers know when  
you’re open. Here’s what customers see when they view your business on  
Google.

Update my holiday hours  
<http://business.google.com/n/9834080693527179285/profile/info/edit/specia
